creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Today the phpMyAdmin project announced the end of support for the 2.11
branch.  There will be no more patches or security fixes to this
branch.  However, distfiles will remain available for the forseeable
future.

Therefore deprecate this port, but set an expiration date six months
from now.  That should be adequate time for anyone to upgrade.

If anyone would like to take over maintainership of this port to keep
it available for longer than that, I will happily hand it over to
them.

Deprecation notice from upstream:

"The phpMyAdmin team announces the end of life for the 2.11 branch. No 
fixes or security fixes will happen. Note that this is the version used 
on servers with old PHP 4 and MySQL < 5.0 technology.

Version 2.11.11.3 will remain in the older releases download area.

Marc Delisle, for the team"
